what_is_the_error: End-to-end latency for checkout has crossed the SLO threshold; p95 response time is elevated and user-facing pages are slow.
likely_cause: Downstream dependency (payments or inventory) is slow, cache hit rate dropped, or a recent deployment increased per-request work.
remediation_suggestions: Check service dashboards for dependency latency and error rates.
Validate recent deploys; consider a fast rollback if correlated with the spike.
Scale checkout replicas temporarily if CPU or connection pools are saturated.
Warm caches or tune timeouts only after confirming root cause.
triage_summary: High-severity latency spike on checkout-demo: sustained elevated latency consistent with dependency slowdown or capacity pressure.
suspected_cause: Downstream latency or insufficient capacity after a change.
